title: AgentGrid: Your AI agents team, terminals, notes: one infinite canvas | Product Hunt
excerpt: Your AI coding agents, visible on one persistent infinite canvas. Spawn role-based workers (builder, QA, reviewer, devops) and an orchestrator runs the build, review, fix, validate loop while you steer. Terminals, browsers, notes and git live beside your agents, so checking on your AI is a glance, not an interrogation. Your whole workspace persists across restarts: every agent, session and pane restored where you left it. Works with Claude Code and Codex, locally. macOS, Linux and Windows.

content_text: Your AI coding agents, visible on one persistent infinite canvas. Spawn role-based workers (builder, QA, reviewer, devops) and an orchestrator runs the build, review, fix, validate loop while you steer. Terminals, browsers, notes and git live beside your agents, so checking on your AI is a glance, not an interrogation. Your whole workspace persists across restarts: every agent, session and pane restored where you left it. Works with Claude Code and Codex, locally. macOS, Linux and Windows.
content_html_zh: 您的人工智能编码代理在一张持久的无限画布上可见。生成基于角色的工作人员（构建者、QA、审阅者、开发人员）和编排器，在您指导时运行构建、审阅、修复、验证循环。终端、浏览器、笔记和 git 就在您的代理旁边，因此只需一瞥即可检查您的 AI，而不是审问。您的整个工作区在重新启动后仍然存在：每个代理、会话和窗格都恢复到您离开的位置。在本地与 Claude Code 和 Codex 配合使用。 macOS、Linux 和 Windows。
